ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Shipping mode used for the order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order (including tax and discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment the customer belongs to (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program details (e.g., points, rewards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the product (including discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Shipping mode used for the order */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which sales are being analyzed */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the product */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales occurred */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter for which sales are being analyzed */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which sales are being analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order from which the product was returned */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the product was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Sales, Marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., View Sales Data, Edit Customer Information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
